title: EKG Technician
description: Baxter International is seeking an EKG Technician for our Austin clinical facility. You'll operate electrocardiographic equipment, record patient data, and support our healthcare operations team. This hybrid role offers the opportunity to work in medical technology with a global leader in healthcare solutions.
responsibilities: Perform electrocardiographic (EKG) tests; operate and maintain EKG equipment
Record patient information and test results accurately; maintain records
Communicate with patients to ensure comfort and obtain necessary information
Perform routine equipment maintenance and troubleshooting
Support clinical staff with test scheduling and coordination

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; EKG certification preferred
skills: Proficiency with EKG equipment and operation
Strong patient care and interpersonal abilities
Ability to work in a clinical healthcare setting

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
